code:
import io
import string

let text = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(text)
let sep = string.from_byte(1)
mut seen = sep
mut count = 0
mut current = ""
mut i = 0
while i < n
  let b_opt = string.byte_at(text, i)
  let b = match b_opt
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
  if is_ws
    if not string.is_empty(current)
      let key = "#{sep}#{current}#{sep}"
      if not string.contains(seen, key)
        seen = "#{seen}#{current}#{sep}"
        count = count + 1
      end
      current = ""
    end
  else
    current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if not string.is_empty(current)
  let key = "#{sep}#{current}#{sep}"
  if not string.contains(seen, key)
    count = count + 1
  end
end
println("unique=#{count}")
